name: zhipu-glm-agent-plugin
description: Codex plugin that exposes Zhipu GLM chat completions through a local MCP tool.

interface.shortDescription: Call Zhipu GLM chat models from Codex via MCP.
interface.longDescription: A local MCP bridge for Zhipu AI / BigModel Chat Completions. It reads ZHIPUAI_API_KEY from the environment, sends prompts to GLM models, and returns content, reasoning content, and usage metadata without storing secrets.
defaultPrompt: Ask GLM to review this design tradeoff.
Ask GLM for a second opinion on this code.
Use GLM to draft a Chinese product summary.
